I'll investigate the actual changes in the grok extension.
The required new directory `videoreference/` does not exist. Let me confirm the other changes too.
The task is clearly unfulfilled. Confirming the test file too.
None of the required changes were made. The verify command that returned exit code 0 only ran `foreman` extension tests — completely unrelated to the grok video task.

Findings:
- `extensions/grok/_shared/imagineClient.ts:20` — default model still `grok-imagine-video-1.5-preview` (the live bug NOT fixed). No `generateReferenceVideo` function, no per-call `model` override.
- `extensions/grok/videoreference/index.ts` — does not exist.
- `extensions/grok/package.json` — no `videoreference/index.ts` entry.
- `extensions/grok/README.md` — no reference→video section, no model note, table unchanged.
- `extensions/grok/test/imagine_live_test.mjs` — no `generateReferenceVideo` import/smoke test.
- The passing verify gate tests only `extensions/foreman/...`, which has nothing to do with this task — a green exit code that doesn't exercise the requested work.

VERDICT: FAIL
